content.en:
The white-bearded old man said: "The Eternal Hall was established by a group of Eternal Controllers, as for how many Eternal Masters there are in the Eternal Palace, it is inconvenient for me to disclose. When you join the Temple of Eternity, you'll know. "

"The power of the Temple of Eternity is not very constrained, it can be said that it is an idle organization, and the purpose of its establishment is only to cultivate more eternal masters. Of course, it is not the peak of the powerful Legendary Realm Lord who can join the Hall of Eternity. There are several ways to join the Hall of Eternity, such as the recommendation of the Eternal Master, how to pass through the Dao City, or several other ways. "

"There are many opportunities and benefits to joining the Temple of Eternity, and I am a member of the Temple of Eternity. "

"Moreover, after joining the Temple of Eternity, you can even consult the Eternal Master once, and you can also see more secrets. "

"I suggest you do your best to join the Temple of Eternity, of course, if your goal is only to be a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and if you are not ready to become an Eternal Master, then it doesn't make much sense to join or not. "

Subsequently. 16

The white-bearded old man said a lot of news and intelligence about the Eternal Palace, which made Ye Tian know more about the Eternal Palace.

For Ye Tian, the Hall of Eternity is not very restrictive, so he can join.

He doesn't like to be constrained.

Moreover, as the white-bearded old man said, if he wants to become the master of eternity, he will have a greater chance to join the Temple of Eternity.

By joining the Temple of Eternity, he had the opportunity to learn more about the secrets, the things he needed to pay attention to when attacking the Eternal Master, how to avoid dangers, and so on.

If you don't understand anything, you will attack the Eternal Master, and the end will likely be a fall.

Subsequently, Ye Tian played a game of chess with the white-bearded old man, and after playing chess, he was ready to leave Xuyang Mountain.

Before leaving.

The white-bearded old man made a suggestion to Ye Tian: "Endless Lord, with your current realm, if you want to progress, it will take a long time, I suggest that you can go to the Mad Demon Sea, maybe it will help you a little." "

"Mad Demon Sea, I remember, thank you for the reminder!"

After Ye Tian left Xuyang Mountain, he went to investigate the records about the Mad Demon Sea.

Soon, he investigated the Mad Demon Sea.

There are so many places in the Void Region, and the Mad Demon Sea is not very famous, so Ye Tian doesn't know much about it, so he must investigate it carefully.

It didn't take long for a piece of information to appear in Ye Tian's hands.

After reading it, Ye Tian had enough understanding of the Mad Demon Sea.

The Mad Sea is not a treasure land, but a Jedi.

After entering the Mad Demon Sea, the will will be annihilated and completely frozen to death.

Even the Peak Legendary Realm Lord was reluctant to enter the Mad Demon Sea, because if he stayed in the Mad Demon Sea for a long time, even the Peak Legendary Realm Lord would fall into a mad demon state.

Crazy state of the head?

That is, like a madman, who has no control over his temper, and his will is very confused, and in the eyes of others, he is a madman.

If a peak Legendary Realm lord became a madman, it would be a disaster, and he would not even be able to do normal cultivation.

Because, no one wants to enter the Mad Demon Sea, which naturally leads to the Mad Demon Sea not being famous, and no one pays attention to it.

"The white-bearded old man actually suggested that I go to the Mad Demon Sea?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

He wasn't afraid of mad demons, and as a third-level peak Legendary Realm lord, he wouldn't have problems as soon as he entered the mad demon sea.

So, after he learned the location of the Mad Demon Sea, he sent a copy body to the Mad Demon Sea.

-----------------

Sea of Madness.

This is a red sea shrouded in blood clouds, and this is actually an eternal sea, but it is an eternal sea that has not developed.

Because there is no living soul in the Crazy Demon Sea, and without living beings, powerful cultivators cannot be born, and then the Crazy Demon Sea cannot grow, and it has always been like this.

Gradually, the Mad Demon Sea was no longer recognized as an eternal sea, and only regarded it as a forbidden place.

But in reality, its essence is an eternal sea.

"The Void Region could have given birth to such a place!"

Ye Tian was curious.

Immediately, he stepped into the sea of mad demons.

As soon as he entered the Sea of Crazy Demons, countless strange forces poured into his will, as if they were about to disintegrate his will power.

Even the will of the seventh-order peak was vaguely very uncomfortable, and it was on the verge of being very painful.

"No wonder even the Peak Legendary Realm Lord is reluctant to come over, I have reached the third level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord combat power, although the will is also the peak of the seventh order, but I have gone far at the peak of the seventh order, but even so, it is still so painful.

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't leave immediately, but forcibly endured the pain, sat cross-legged, and threw himself into the confrontation with the strange power of the Mad Demon Sea.

Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man's gaze seemed to pass through infinite time and space, and he saw Ye Tian in the sea of mad demons.

"Endless Lord, the Mad Demon Sea is a good place of opportunity, if you persist, you will definitely gain a lot, I hope you can hold on. "

The white-bearded old man muttered.

If Ye Tian couldn't persevere, then no matter how fast he cultivated before, there would be no 607 method worthy of his attention.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian continued to cultivate in the Mad Demon Sea, bearing the invasion of the power of the Mad Demon Sea, his will was constantly consumed, but he was also becoming more and more tenacious.

In fact, after cultivating for a period of time, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation.

The Mad Demon Sea is indeed a forbidden place, but it is also a place of great opportunity, which can help temper the will and keep the will constantly improving.

Perhaps this can make his will reach the level of a half-step eighth-order.

If his will is raised to the half-step eighth order, the degree of space-time fusion is improved, and his strength may be able to break through the second layer of the Dao Domain Tower.

Before you know it, an eternal year has passed.

Perhaps for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, an eternal year is a very short time, but if you can cultivate an eternal year in the Mad Demon Sea, it will be a long time.

After an eternal year of penance, Ye Tian's willpower has been tempered to be extremely tenacious, and his willpower has improved a lot

Then, one eternity after another passed.

In the end, Ye Tian cultivated here for an eternal era.

After cultivating for so long, Ye Tian finally became familiar with the environment here, and he could almost continue to practice penance forever.

According to this method of penance, it might not take him too long to raise his willpower to the level of a half-step eighth-order. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
